label: Riftwarden Stores
description: Riftwarden Stores is a narrow service chamber cut into the terrace-concrete behind the lodging’s sealed partition shutters, its poured_phi-reinforced walls pierced by capped conduits for heat and air filtration. Ration lockers and ferrosteel shelving run wall to wall in regimented bays, their faces stenciled for allotment control and rapid inventory under blackout discipline. The ceiling remains low and vault-braced, with recessed lumen strips fitted behind blast grilles to prevent light-spill during alerts. The floor is set with grated drains and a raised threshold lip, reflecting enclave standards for contamination control and water recovery.
